reasoning: For Date 1 (2025-11-02), the market close used will be Friday, Oct 31. This is before both the Q3 earnings on November 4 and the ex-dividend date on November 6. For Date 2 (2025-11-25), the stock will have undergone the earnings report and faced a $0.43 per share ex-dividend markdown, which creates a headwind of roughly 1.8% against the stock price. For Date 3 (2026-01-24), there is a longer horizon (3 months) which introduces more uncertainty. As per the instructions, uncertainty increases with horizon, so I pull the probability closer to 0.5 (49%).
